description:
To properly set the permissions of /var/log/journal/.*/system.journal, run the command: 
$ sudo chmod 0640 /var/log/journal/.*/system.journal
rationale: RHCOS must protect system  journal file from any type of unauthorized access by setting file permissions.
ocil:
To check the permissions of /var/log/journal/.*/system.journal, run the command: 
$ ls -l /var/log/journal/.*/system.journal
If properly configured, the output should indicate the following permissions: -rw-r-----
title: Verify Permissions on the system journal
